quotes: Fluid wave forms in two colorways: Sunshine/Gold and Sky Blue/Deep Blue; each in long and short variants.
Construction: top wave layer at 70% transparency over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue) — always preserve the layered, translucent quality.

rules.intent: Maintain brand visual authenticity and depth layering for wave elements.
rules.rule_text: Fluid wave forms must only be rendered in two approved colorways: Sunshine/Gold and Sky Blue/Deep Blue, in long and short variants. The top wave layer must always be set to 70% transparency (opacity.logo.gold = 0.7) over the base wave to preserve their translucent quality.

quotes: Masthead gradient with logo mark (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.

rules.intent: Provide a consistent visual container and background brand gradient for copy in the top masthead.
rules.rule_text: The masthead gradient device (Sunshine to 0C,10M,78Y,0K) with the logo mark placed at the lightest end must be used for holding copy in masthead positions.
